recommendations.title: The Old Ways
recommendations.overview: Cristina, a journalist of Mexican origin, travels to her ancestral home in Veracruz to investigate a story of sorcery and healing. There, she is kidnapped by a group of locals who claim she's the devil incarnated.

recommendations.title: Two Witches
recommendations.overview: A matriarchal witch passes on her sinister inheritance to her grand-daughter, triggering the most horrific curses.

recommendations.title: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark
recommendations.overview: A young girl sent to live with her father and his new girlfriend discovers creatures in her new home who want to claim her as one of their own.

recommendations.title: American Poltergeist
recommendations.overview: A group of friends move into a vacation home with a sinister past in Fall River, Massachusetts. Suspicious of the home's owner, Taryn feels a strong connection to the house and finds herself at the center of one of the most deadly poltergeists in Ame

recommendations.title: The Wicker Man
recommendations.overview: Police sergeant Neil Howie is called to an island village in search of a missing girl whom the locals claim never existed. The investigation is further complicated as Howie’s religious views clash with those of the island’s residents.

recommendations.title: Vincent
recommendations.overview: Young Vincent Malloy dreams of being just like Vincent Price and loses himself in macabre daydreams that annoy his mother.

recommendations.title: Vincent Must Die
recommendations.overview: Vincent finds himself under attack for no apparent reason overnight. When the phenomenon intensifies, he must run and change his way of life completely.

recommendations.title: The Video Dead
recommendations.overview: On a quiet, tree-lined street, an old television set receives a single channel that repeats the same horror film over and over, freeing zombies from the grave to kill.

recommendations.title: (Girl)Friend
recommendations.overview: Vincent and Nefeli just moved in together. They're best friends and swore to never fall in love again. That is until Vincent meets Julie.

recommendations.title: Uzumaki
recommendations.overview: The inhabitants of a small Japanese town become increasingly obsessed with and tormented by spirals.
